---
title: "Tidytuesday: Week 9"
subtitle: "2026-03-03"
format:
  html:
---

```{r}
#| label: Setup

library(tidyverse)
library(tidytuesdayR)

tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load(2026,week = 9 )

clutch_size <- tuesdata$clutch_size_cleaned

tortoise_body_condition <- tuesdata$tortoise_body_condition_cleaned

df <- tortoise_body_condition |>
  inner_join(clutch_size, by = "individual") |>
  group_by(year) |> 
  summarise(avg_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

avg_body_mass <- tortoise_body_condition |> 
  group_by(year) |>
  summarise(avg_body_mass = mean(body_mass_grams, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


ggplot(avg_body_mass, aes(x = year, y = avg_body_mass)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Average Body Mass of Tortoises Over Time",
       x = "Year",
       y = "Average Body Mass (grams)") +
  theme_minimal()
```
